LanguageData.VAERoy_CraneThought.stages.0.description: My royal gardens are full of the most noble of birds.
LanguageData.VAERoy_CraneThought.stages.0.label: beautiful cranes
LanguageData.VAERoy_TutorDied.stages.0.description: That lovely orungatun taught me a lot. This universe is evil!
LanguageData.VAERoy_TutorDied.stages.0.label: tutoring animal {0} died
LanguageData.VAERoy_TutorKilled.stages.0.label: killed my tutoring animal
LanguageData.VAERoy_TutorLost.stages.0.description: That lovely orungatun taught me a lot. This universe is evil!
LanguageData.VAERoy_TutorLost.stages.0.label: tutoring animal {0} lost
